title: Feningland
description: A Mod Aiming to Revive the feeling of classic 1.12.2 mods by including lots of Dimensions,Biomes,Entites,Weapons and a whole lot more.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57641b1becdfebf4d9479e28c7b13ea94e70f2b8.png)A totally Normal Joke Mod Without any lore...

Includes Characters:Vll r,Glor b,Magic Johnson Vll r (epic asf bossfight), and more YOU can find out...

Dimensions:Fening Dimension,Limbo,wasteland,hell,magic dimension

Biome:Feningland with LOTS of cool  custom structures for you to explore...
